summary: App includes a 'Buy now' (Bolt Now) flow with product selection, address/GPS confirmation before payment options, and payment-method-specific detail collection (card details or phone number), plus corrected branding text on the payment success page.
architectural_notes: Introduce pre-payment step: product/battery selection -> address/GPS confirmation -> /payment-options.
known_issues: Payment successful page shows incorrect text "Volt Now" instead of "Bolt Now".

existing_features.title: Add a new top-level navigation option labeled "Buy Now" in the site header (desktop + mobile) that navigates to a new route "/buy-now".
Create a new page at route "/buy-now" that displays all uploaded images in a responsive grid/list, with a visible "Buy Now" action for each image item.
Implement a new route "/payment-options" and redirect users there when they click any "Buy Now" button on the "/buy-now" page.
Register the new frontend routes ("/buy-now" and "/payment-options") in the router configuration so direct navigation via URL works.
Enhance the /payment-options page layout and content to provide a clearer, more polished payment selection experience consistent with the rest of the site styling.

Replace the current placeholder proceed behavior (browser alert) with an in-app continuation flow from /payment-options that routes the user to an existing result page when they click the primary action.

Show a lightweight order summary on /payment-options based on the product the user clicked on the /buy-now page, and ensure /buy-now passes enough information during navigation for /payment-options to render that summary (with a reasonable fallback when opened directly).
Update the Payment Successful page copy to replace any instance of "Volt Now"/"VOLTNOW" with "Bolt Now" (case-insensitive), using English user-facing text.

Insert an address/location confirmation step between product selection and payment options: after a user selects a battery/product on /buy-now, redirect them to a new address confirmation page where they can either (a) share current location via the browser's GPS/geolocation permission prompt or (b) manually enter an address; only after confirming an address/location should the flow continue to /payment-options.

Register the new address confirmation route in the TanStack Router configuration and ensure direct navigation via URL works; update navigation/search parameter handling so /payment-options can receive both productId and the confirmed address/location data with a reasonable fallback when opened directly.

On /payment-options, collect payment-method-specific details before allowing the user to proceed: selecting "Credit/Debit Card" must show and require card detail fields; selecting "Mobile Payment" must show and require a phone number field; other payment methods may proceed without extra fields unless already required by existing UI logic.

new_feature_requests.summary: Add a 'Buy now' option/tab that shows the provided images and includes a Buy Now action that redirects to payment options.
Enhance the /payment-options payment screen UX/UI (improve layout/content and overall payment selection experience).
Fix copy/branding on the payment successful page: change all instances of "Volt Now" to "Bolt Now".
After selecting the battery/product, redirect to an address confirmation page that can request current location via GPS; once confirmed, continue to /payment-options.
On /payment-options, collect payment-method-specific details: credit/debit card requires card details; mobile payments require phone number.

projectName: Add 'Buy Now' tab with product images and redirect to payment options
